name: Baked Red Snapper with Sour Cream Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the stuffing by cooking celery and onion in butter or oil until tender.
2. Mix sour cream and dill in a separate bowl.
3. Combine all stuffing ingredients thoroughly. The mixture should make about one quart of stuffing.
4. Clean, wash, and dry the red snapper fish.
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper inside and out of the fish.
6. Loosely stuff the fish with the prepared stuffing.
7. Secure the opening of the fish with toothpicks.
8. Place the stuffed fish in a well-greased baking pan.
9. Brush the fish with melted butter or oil.
10. Bake at 350°F (moderate oven) for 50 to 60 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily. Baste occasionally with butter or oil.
11. Serves 6.
SOURCE: 1979 New Orleans Times-Picayune Recipe Contest Cookbook
